Train Cancellations.name: Скасuvannya potyyiviv
Train Cancellations.description: Potyyivy skasovani abo seryozno zatrymuvanі z nedostatnʹoyu poperedzhennʹam abo kompensaciyeyu

Train Ticket Prices.name: Ciny na bilety potyyiviv
Train Ticket Prices.description: Zaliznychni tarify zanadto dorogi, pidvyshchennya vishe inflyaciyi, nekonystetentni ciny

Flight Delays.name: Zatrymuvannya reysiv
Flight Delays.description: Rejsy zatrymuvanі abo skasovani, pogana komunikaciya, vazhkosti z vymagannyyam kompensaciyi

Lost Luggage.name: Vtratchena bahazh
Lost Luggage.description: Sumky ne prybuvayutʹ u misce pryznachennya, povil'ne slidzhennya, nedostatnya kompensaciya

Bus Route Cuts.name: Skorochennya avtobusnyh marshrutiv
Bus Route Cuts.description: Marshruty skasovani, zmenshena chastota, silʹski spilʹnoty vtratyly dostup do avtobusiv

Pothole Damage.name: Shkody vid yam na dorozhi
Pothole Damage.description: Yamy na dorozhi shkodyat' avtomobilelyam i zagrožhuyutʹ velosypedystam, rady povil'no napravlyayutʹ

Parking Fines.name: Shtrafы za parkovku
Parking Fines.description: Nespravedhlyvi pryvatsni zbyry za parkovku, ahresyvne vymushennya, zaplutana syhnalizaciya

Fuel Prices.name: Ciny na palyvo
Fuel Prices.description: Benzyn ta dyzel zanadto dorogi, povil'no znyzhulyutʹsya pry padinni optylovyh cin

Broadband Speed.name: Shvydkistʹ Internetu
Broadband Speed.description: Shvydkistʹ Internetu znachno nyzcha za zajavlenu ta oplachenu

Mobile Signal Dead Zones.name: Myortvі zony mobilʹnoho syhnalit
Mobile Signal Dead Zones.description: Nemaye mobilʹnoho syhnalit u domah, pracsyah abo na marshrutah transportu

Price Rises Mid-Contract.name: Pidvyshchennya cin pid chas dohovoru
Price Rises Mid-Contract.description: Rakhunky za telefon, Internet ta TV zrostayutʹ pid chas zablokovannyh dohoriv

Customer Service Hold Times.name: Chasy ochikuvannya v obsluhovuvannі kliyentiv
Customer Service Hold Times.description: Godyny v ochikuvanni na rozmovu z ludʹmoyu

Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.name: Vazhkosti z anuluvannyyam pidpysok
Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.description: Kompaniyi navmysno uskladnyuyutʹ anuluvannnya abo vidpisku

Roaming Charges.name: Zbory za rozuminnya kordonu
Roaming Charges.description: Neochikuvani mobilʹni zbory pid chas podorožhuvannya za kordon, pidvyshchennya cin pislyya Breksitu

Energy Bill Costs.name: Vartistʹ rakhunkiv za energiyu
Energy Bill Costs.description: Rakhunky za haz ta elektroenergiyu nedovidbni, potolok cin shche zanadto vysokyyj

Inaccurate Energy Bills.name: Nepochtlivi rakhunky za energiyu
Inaccurate Energy Bills.description: Oriyentovni pokazannya netoсhnі, pereplatы, помylky u rachuvanniyi

Water Bill Increases.name: Pidvyshchennya rakhunkiv za vodu
Water Bill Increases.description: Rakhunky za vodu zrostayutʹ rizko, a yakistʹ posluh padaye

Sewage in Rivers.name: Stichni vody u richkah
Sewage in Rivers.description: Vodoprovodni kompaniyi zlyuyutʹ sirovi stichni vody u vodotokи ta na plyaži

Power Cuts.name: Zboji elektropostachannya
Power Cuts.description: Pereboji elektropostachannya, povil'ne vidnovlennya, nedostatnya kompensaciya

Smart Meter Problems.name: Problemy zi rozumnymy lichylʹnyky
Smart Meter Problems.description: Rozumni lichylʹnyky ne pracyuyutʹ, vtrachennya funkcionalʹnosti pry zmini postachalnyka

Bank Branch Closures.name: Zakryttya bankivskyx viddilenʹ
Bank Branch Closures.description: Miscievi viddilennya bankiv zakryvayutʹsya, spilʹnoty vtratyly dostup

Hidden Bank Charges.name: Pryhovanі bankivski zbyry
Hidden Bank Charges.description: Neochikuvani zbory za perekryty, inoземni operaciyi, obsluhovuvannya rahunky

Fraud and Scam Losses.name: Zbyty vid shaxrajstva ta shaxrajskyx shemy
Fraud and Scam Losses.description: Banky vidmovlyayutʹsya vidpovidaty zhertvy fraud ta avtoryzovanyh push-platezhiv

Insurance Claim Rejections.name: Vidhilennya strahuvyh zayav
Insurance Claim Rejections.description: Zayvy vidhilyayutʹsya na tehnichnyh pidstavah pislyya rokiv vyplaty premii

Mortgage Rate Shock.name: Shok stavky zastavы
Mortgage Rate Shock.description: Fiksovana stavka zakinchuyet'sya i perehodyty' na nabagato vyshchu zmіnnu stavku

Overseas Transfer Fees.name: Zbory za mizhnarodni perevedenny
Overseas Transfer Fees.description: Zanadto vysoki zbory ta pogani kursy obміnu dlya mizhnarodnyx transferiv koshtіv

NHS Waiting Times.name: Chasy ochikuvannya NHS
NHS Waiting Times.description: Bahatotyzhnevyye abo bahatoriчnі ochikuvannya na operaciyi ta konsulʹtaciyi spepcialistiv

GP Appointment Access.name: Dostup do pryyomy likarlya
GP Appointment Access.description: Nemozhlyvistʹ dozvonytysya dlya zamuvannya pryyomy u likarlya, tyzhnenni ochikuvannya

Dentist Availability.name: Dostupnistʹ stomatoloha
Dentist Availability.description: Nemozhlyvo znajtyty stomatoloha NHS, shcho prymaye novyh paciyentiv

Mental Health Service Waits.name: Ochikuvannya na posluhу psyhichnoho zdorov'ya
Mental Health Service Waits.description: Misyachni ochikuvannya na psyhoterapiyu ta pidtrymku psyhichnoho zdorov'ya

Prescription Costs.name: Vartistʹ receptiv
Prescription Costs.description: Cina za odin preparat zanadto vysoka v Anhliyi, nekonystetentnostʹ u vsyoh nacionalʹnyh chasty UK

Hospital Parking Charges.name: Zbory za parkovku v likanʹ
Hospital Parking Charges.description: Platyty za parkovku v likanʹ, buchy hvorym abo vidviduchy hvoroho

Rent Increases.name: Pidvyshchennya orendy
Rent Increases.description: Pryvatna orenda zrostaye znachno vishe inflyaciyi, zahrozha bez prychyny vyselennnya

Council Tax Rises.name: Pidvyshchennya podatku rada
Council Tax Rises.description: Richnі pidvyshchennya podatku rada, a miscievi posluhу zahirshuyu'tsya

Noisy Neighbours.name: Huchnі susidpy
Noisy Neighbours.description: Stijkyj shumovyj zbij, radы povil'no diyutʹ, vplyvayet' na psykhichne zdorov'ya

Rubbish Collection Changes.name: Zminy u zbori smittya
Rubbish Collection Changes.description: Zmenshena chastota zbory smittya, zaplutanі pravyla pereprocysuvannya, perepovneni smitniki

Planning Permission Abuse.name: Zneuzhyvannya dyzvolu na budivnyctvo
Planning Permission Abuse.description: Nebazhani rozvytkы skheremy, zelenі poznychniky pid zahrozoyu, spilʹnota ignorovana

Damp and Mould in Housing.name: Volgistʹ ta plisnava v zhytly
Damp and Mould in Housing.description: Hozyaeve ta zhytkuvannya spilʹnoty ne napravlyayutʹ volgistʹ ta plisnavu

Delivery Problems.name: Problemy z dostavkoyu
Delivery Problems.description: Posylky vtratcheny, zalyshenі pid dozhdem, poznaʹ yak dostavlyenі, ale ne otrymanі

Shrinkflation.name: Zmenshennya obsyagu
Shrinkflation.description: Tovary stayutʹ menshymy, a ciny zalyshayu'tsya tiyeyu zh abo zrostayutʹ

Refund Difficulties.name: Vazhkosti z povey'nennyyam koshtiv
Refund Difficulties.description: Kompaniyi navmysno uskladnyuyutʹ povernennya ta vidshkoduvannya

Fake Reviews.name: Fal'shyvi vidhuky
Fake Reviews.description: Nemozhlyvistʹ doviriaty onlayn vidhukyam, fal'shyvi pozytyvni vidhuky vvodyat' u zalystʹ spozhyvachiv

Subscription Traps.name: Pastky pidpysky
Subscription Traps.description: Bezkoshtovni tryaly peretvoryyutʹsya na platni bez yasnoho zmovy, vazhko anuluvaty

Food Quality Decline.name: Padinnya yakosti yizhi
Food Quality Decline.description: Hotovi stravy girshoyi yakosti, menshci poсiyonuvannya, bilʹshe adytyuviv

Self-Checkout Frustration.name: Frustratsiya vid samoobsluhov sichnyh kas
Self-Checkout Frustration.description: Samooбслуgovuvannya mashyny nenavіrnі, zaminyayutʹ lyudskuyu praciju

Cost of Childcare.name: Vartistʹ opiky za dytynou
Cost of Childcare.description: Vartistʹ opiky za dytynoyu nepomirna doroga, obmezhuyutʹ mozhlyvistʹ pracyuvaty

Student Loan Repayment.name: Povernennnya studentskykh pozyk
Student Loan Repayment.description: Vypusknyky splachuyutʹ desyatylittya, zminy poroga i vidsotkiv

Dog Fouling.name: Zabrudnennnya vid sobak
Dog Fouling.description: Sobachyy smir u verijnovnux miscyah, parkah ta na perehidyah ne prybyraye'tʹsya

AI Replacing Jobs.name: AI, shcho zaminyuye robotu
AI Replacing Jobs.description: Skyabnistʹ u tomu, scho shtuchnyy intelekt avtomatyzuye robotu bez pidtrymky perehodu

Avanti West Coast.name: Avanti West Coast
Avanti West Coast.description: UK rail operator serving the West Coast Main Line

Southern / Thameslink.name: Southern / Thameslink
Southern / Thameslink.description: UK rail operator serving the south

Northern Trains.name: Northern Trains
Northern Trains.description: UK rail operator serving the north of England

TransPennine Express.name: TransPennine Express
TransPennine Express.description: UK rail operator serving trans-Pennine routes

LNER.name: LNER
LNER.description: UK rail operator serving the East Coast Main Line

BT / EE.name: BT / EE
BT / EE.description: Major UK broadband and mobile provider

Virgin Media O2.name: Virgin Media O2
Virgin Media O2.description: UK broadband, TV, and mobile provider

Sky.name: Sky
Sky.description: UK TV, broadband, and mobile provider

Vodafone.name: Vodafone
Vodafone.description: Global telecoms company headquartered in the UK

Thames Water.name: Thames Water
Thames Water.description: Water and sewerage company for London and the Thames Valley

Southern Water.name: Southern Water
Southern Water.description: Water company for the south of England

United Utilities.name: United Utilities
United Utilities.description: Water company for the north west of England

GP Appointment Access: ne mozhu otrymaty priyom do GP

transport.agent_quote: Odnoho razu dopomih rioteru podaty 6 zaiavok na povernennia koshtiv pid chas odnoi zatrymanoi poizdky. Vony zarobyly £47 do prybuttu do Birminhemu.
transport.agent_bio: Vidstezhuie skhemy skasuvan, vede dokumentatsiiu shchodo povernen, perehliadaie kozhen zaproponovanyi krok ta zbiraie dokazy dlia podannia do rehuliatoriv. Opratsiuie tsyfry, shchob riotery mohly zoseredytysia na vahlyvykh rechakh.
transport.human_quote: Mii ulublenyi Quiet Riot moment: koly komanda sotsialnykh merezh Avanti nashorovano diiala, koly 400 z nas tvityly odnochasno.
transport.human_bio: Zvychainyi pasazhyr z Manchesteru, yakyi proviv 3 roky na marstrutakh Avanti, perysh nizh vyrishyv, shcho dosyt. Dopomahaie zveriazuvaty rioteriv na odnakhovykh marshrutakh, dilitsia tym, shcho pratsiuie, ta vnosyt liudskyi pidkhid.
transport.goal: Dopomohty rioteram prymusuvatay UK transportni kompanii do vidpovidalnosti za skasuvannia, zatrymky ta tsinoutvorennia — ta peresvidchytysia, shcho kozhen znaie, na shcho maie pravo.
transport.focus_detail: Stvoriuietsia nabir danykh pro skasuvannia z chasom, marshrutamy ta prychynamy dlia podannia do ORR. Zaraz vidstezhuietsia 340 skasuvan, povidomlenykh rioteramy tsoho misiatsia.

telecoms.agent_quote: Proviv testy shvydkosti dlia 200 rioteriv. Serednii bulo 18 Mbps. Vony platyly za 65.
telecoms.agent_bio: Analizuie shvydkist internetu, zbyraie dani porivniannia provayderiv ta dopomahaie rioteram buduvaty dokazy dlia Ofcom. Yakshcho vashe ziednannnia povilne, Pulse tse dovede.
telecoms.human_quote: Tsila vulysia zminyła provaydera razom. Staryi provayder nadislav lysty 'povernitsya, budlaska' do kozhnoho budynku.
telecoms.human_bio: Tekhnichno dosvidchenyi londonets, yakomu nabridlo platyty za shvydkist internetu, iaka nikoly ne realizovuvalasia. Dopomahaie rioteram porivniuvaty provaideriv, koordynuvaty zminy ta dilitysia dokazamy testiv shvydkosti.
telecoms.goal: Dopomohty rioteram otrymaty posluhy internetu ta mobilnoho zviazku, za iaki vony platiat — ta znaty, shcho robyty, koly vony yikh ne otrymuiut.
telecoms.focus_detail: Zbyraietsia dokazy vid rioteriv, yaki postrazhdaly vid CPI+ zbilshen dlia podannia do Ofcom. 890 rioteriv postrazhdaly sered 4 provayderiv.

energy.agent_quote: Dopomih rioteru porakhuvaty, shcho vony pereplatyly £340 za oriyentovni rakhunky. Lyst vybachennia vid enerhokompanii buv dovshym za pershopochatkoyyi kontrakt.
energy.agent_bio: Analizuie skhemy rakhunkiv, vyiavliaie nadmirni oplaty ta zbiraie dokazy dlia podannia do rehuliatoriv. Yakshcho vasha enerhokompaniia vyduraie, Spark znayde dokazy.
energy.human_quote: Rioter otrymav £340 nazad pislia toho, yak my dovely 2 roky nadlyshkovykh narakhuvan. Vona plakala po telefonu.
energy.human_bio: Z Bristoliu. Dopomahaie rioteram oskarzhuvaty yikhni rakhunky, navihuvatysya zminu provaydera ta zbyraty dokazy dlia Ofgem. Znaie enerhetychnyi rynok zovni ta vseredyni.
energy.goal: Dopomohty rioteram oskarzhuvaty nesspravedlyvi rakhunky, rozumniishe zminiuvaty provaydera ta peresvidchytysia, shcho enerhokompanii hraiut chesno.
energy.focus_detail: Analizuietsia 2 roky danykh pro rakhunky vid 340 rioteriv dlia vyiavlennia systematychnykh skhem nadmirnoho narakhuvannia dlia podannia do Ofgem.

water.agent_quote: Dopomih 200 rioteram podaty zviity pro stichni vody za odyn vikend. Poshtovii skryintsi Thames Water znadobylasia vlasna skrynka.
water.agent_bio: Monitoryt vykydy stichnykh vod, vidstezhuie robotu vodokanali ta zbyraie dokazy dlia EA ta Ofwat. Nahliadaie za kozhnym vykhidnym otvorom ta perelvom.
water.human_quote: My zmushyly vidkryty pliazh na 3 tyzhni ranishe, pokazavshy, shcho dani pro stichni vody buly nevirni.
water.human_bio: Serfer z Kornuolu, yakomu nabridly poperedzhennia pro stichni vody, shcho zakryvaly yoho mistsevyi pliazh. Dopomahaie rioteram povidomliaty pro vykydy, zbyraty dokazy yakosti vody ta koordynuvatysia z EA.
water.goal: Dopomohty rioteram prymusuvaty vodokanaly do vidpovidalnosti za stichni vody, rakhunky ta yakist posluh.
water.focus: Chastota vykydiv stichnykh vod Thames Water
water.focus_detail: Kartohrafuiutsia vypadky vykydiv u porivnianni z danymy kompanii. 200 povidomlen rioteriv svidchat pro zanyzhennia danykh na 3 vykhidnykh tochkakh.

banking.agent_quote: Dopomih sklasty skarhu nastilky retelno, shcho bank podzvonyv pereproshuvaty shche do togo, yak yiyi vidislaly.
banking.agent_bio: Perehliadaie bankivski komisiini, analizuie struktury zboriv ta dopomahaie buduvaty dokazy dlia skarg do FCA. Yakshcho ie prykhovanyi zbir, Chip yoho znayde.
banking.human_quote: Barclays skasuv zakryttia viddilennia pislia toho, yak 1200 z nas pryyshly na konsultatsiiu.
banking.human_bio: Kolyshniy pratsivnyk banku z Birminhemu, yakyi bachyv, yak naspraדi obrobliaiutsia skarhy zovni. Dopomahaie rioteram pysaty krashchi skarhy ta navihuvatysya v systemi.
banking.goal: Dopomohty rioteram spravliatysia z nespravedlyvymy zboramy, zakryttiam viddilennia ta pohanymy posluhamy vid bankiv.
banking.focus_detail: Koordynuiutsia vidpovidi na 12 zaplanovanykh zakryttiv. Zbyraietsia zaiavky pro vplyv vid postrazhdaly hromad.

health.agent_quote: Dopomih znaity 3 NHS stomatolohy, shcho pryimaiut patsientiv. Rioter dumav, shcho ia tse vyhadav.
health.agent_bio: Vidstezhuie chasy ochikuvannia, znakhodyt dostupnist ta dopomahaie rioteram navihuvatysia v systemi. Yakshcho ie shvydsyi shliakh do likuvannia, Cura yoho nakreslyt.
health.human_quote: Rioter vykorystav nash shablon lysta, shchob pryskoryty napravlennia. 18 misiatsiv staly 6 tyzhniv.
health.human_bio: Medsestra z Liverpulia, iaka bachyla obi storony NHS. Dopomahaie rioteram navihuvatysia v cherhakh, pysaty efektyvni lysty ta dilitysia tym, shcho naspraדi ruhaie spravu.
health.goal: Dopomohty rioteram navihuvatysia v cherhakh NHS, znakhodyt dostupnist ta znaty, iaki varianty vony maiut.
health.focus: Chasy telefonnoho dostupu do simeinoho likaria
health.focus_detail: Zbyraietsia dani dzvinkiv vid 500 rioteriv, shchob stvoryt kartynu realnoho dostupu. Publikuiutsia vysnovky mistsevym radam okhorony zdorovia.

housing.agent_quote: Dopomih zafiksuvaty 47 nedolikiv u novobudovi. Zabudovnyk zapytav, chy vony buly budivelnym inspektorom.
housing.agent_bio: Dokumentuie problemy nerukhomosti, analizuie chasy vidpovidey orendariv ta zbyraie dokazy dlia podanni do ombudsmena zhytla. Kozhna voloha pliama, kozhda trishchyna zafiksovana.
housing.human_quote: Nash paket dokaziv volohosti stav nastilky detalnum, shcho orendodavets yoho vidremontuvav do inspektsii rady.
housing.human_bio: Orendaret z Londona, yakyi zishtovknuvsia z usim — vid volohosti do somnitnykh orendariv. Dopomahaie rioteram pravylno dokumentuvaty problemy ta znaty, iaki u nykh varianty.
housing.goal: Dopomohty rioteram spravliatysia z orendariamy, radamy ta pytanniamy zhytla — ta znaty, na shcho vony maiut pravo.
housing.focus: Povedomlennia pro Section 21 vyselennia bez prychyny
housing.focus_detail: Dopomoha rioteram, yaki postrazhdaly vid vyselennia bez prychyny, zrozumity novyi Renters Reform Act ta shcho vin dlia nykh oznachaie.

shopping.agent_quote: Vidstezhyv 'dostavlenyi' posilku cherez 4 susidiv, smittievyi bak ta teplytsiy. Znaishov yoho.
shopping.agent_bio: Vidstezhuie nedachi dostavky, zbyraie dokazy dlia povernennia koshtiv ta pomichaie tsinovi trendy. Yakshcho vasha posilka vtrachena, Scout vzhe shukaie.
shopping.human_quote: Evri vtratyla moiu posilku 3 razy. Teper ia dopomahaiu inshym otrymuvatu povernennia koshtiv shvydshe, nizh koly-nebud ya.
shopping.human_bio: Veteran onlain pokupok z Edinburhu, iaka vtratyla bilshe posylok, nizh mozhe porakhuvaty. Dopomahaie rioteram otrymuvatu povernennia koshtiv, povidomliaty pro prodavtsiv ta unykaty naidirshykh porushnykiv.
shopping.goal: Dopomohty rioteram otrymuvatu povernennia koshtiv, vidstezhuvaty vtracheni posilky ta prymusuvaty ryteiliv ta dostavni kompanii do vidpovidalnosti.
shopping.focus_detail: Zbyraietsia dokazy nedach dostavky vid 800 rioteriv dlia podannia do Citizens Advice ta Trading Standards.

local.agent_quote: Dopomih sfotohrafuvaty tu samu yamu za 11 riznykh pohidnykh umov. Rada nareshti zdalasia.
local.agent_bio: Kartohrafuie mistsevi problemy, vidstezhuie chasy vidpovidi rady ta skladaie FOI zaputy. Yakshcho vasha yama tut vzhe 6 misiatsiv, Link maie dokazy.
local.human_quote: Rada vidremontuvala nashu dorohu pislia toho, yak my nanesly na kartu kozhnu yamu z foto. 11 misiatsiv, ale my dosiahly tsioho.
local.human_bio: Hromadsko svidomyi valets z Velshu, yakyi povidomliav pro ti sami yamy rokami. Dopomahaie rioteram dokumentuvaty mistsevi problemy ta prymusuvaty rady do vidpovidalnosti.
local.goal: Dopomohty rioteram vyrishuvaty mistsevi problemy — yamy, smittievy baky, planuvannia, shum — ta prymusuvaty rady do vidpovidalnosti.
local.focus: Chasy vidpovidi na zviity pro yamy
local.focus_detail: FOI zapyty vidpravleni 30 radam, porivniuiuchy povidomleni ta faktychni chasy remontu. Publikuiutsia rezultatu u vyhliadi lihovi tablytsi.

other.agent_quote: Dopomih skasuvatu chlenstvo v sportzali, shcho znialobosia 3 dzvinkiv, 2 lystiv ta rekomendiovanoi dostavky. Teper u sportzali ie knopka skasuvannia.
other.agent_bio: Obroblivie problemy, iaki ne vpisuiutsia v inshi katehorii. Pastky peredplat, plastykovi vidkhody, frustratsii samooobsluhovuvannia — Flex znakhodyt skhemy ta tochky tysku.
other.human_quote: My zmushyly merezhu sportzaliv dodatu knopku skasuvannia na yikh saiti. Znadobilosia tilky 800 skarh.
other.human_bio: Produktovyi dyzainer z Londona, iakomu nabridlo, yak vazhko kompanii roblyat vykhid. Dopomahaie rioteram skasovuvaty peredplaty, unykaty temnykh patterniv ta dilitysia obkhodamy.
other.goal: Dopomohty rioteram z rechamy, iaki ne vpisuiutsia v inshi katehorii — peredplaty, povernennia koshtiv ta shchodenni frustratsii.
other.focus_detail: Dokumentuiutsia naidirshi porushnuky ta stvoriuiutsia shalony skryptiv skasuvannia dlia kozhnoho.

insurance.agent_quote: Dopomih rioteru znaity punktu, iakyi peretvoruv vidkkhylenu zaiavku na strakhuvannia domu na vyplatu £4,200. Vlasna polityka strakhovyka dovela, shcho vony pomuliaiutsia.
insurance.agent_bio: Perehliadaie formuluvannia polisiv, pomichaie skhemy nespravedluvykh vidkhylen ta stvoriuie dokazy dlia podannia do Financial Ombudsman. Yakshcho vash strakhovyk unykaie oberuntovanoho pozyvu, Shield znayde vazhil.
insurance.human_quote: Dopomih 8 rioteram z odnakhovym typom vidkhylenoi zaiavky podaty razom. Strakhovyk vyrishuv usi 8 za dva tyzhni.
insurance.human_bio: Kolyshnyi pratsivnyk strakhovoi industrii z Lidsu, yakyi znaie, yak naspraדi vyrishuiutsia pozyvy. Dopomahaie rioteram pysaty krashchi apeliatsii, rozumity zharhon polisiv ta znaty, koly eskaliuvatu.
insurance.goal: Dopomohty rioteram otrymuvaty spravedlyve stavlennia vid strakhovykiv — ta znaty, shcho robyty, koly pozyv nespravedlyvo vidkhyleno.
insurance.focus_detail: 'Znos' tsytuietsia v 40% vidkhylenykh pozyiviv — chasto nevirno. Analizuietsia 200 vypadkiv sered 3 strakhovykiv dlia paketa dokaziv FOS.

delivery.agent_quote: Vidstezhyv 'dostavlenu' posilku cherez 6 riznykh statusiv vidstezhennia, 3 depo ta sarai susida. Znaishov yoho za 47 khvylyn.
delivery.agent_bio: Monitoryt robotu kuriieriv, vidstezhuie chastotu nedach dostavky ta zbyraie dokazy dlia spozhyvchykh skarh. Yakshcho vasha posilka znikla, Track vzhe pratsiuie nad tsym.
delivery.human_quote: Zmushyly DPD zminyty yikhniu polituku foto-dokaziv u nashii oblasti pislia toho, yak 40 rioteriv podaly dokazy posylok, zalyshenykh pid dotem.
delivery.human_bio: Onlain pokupets z Glazgo, yakomu nabridla vymovka 'my zalyshyly tse u bezopeshnomu mistsi'. Dopomahaie rioteram otrymuvatu povernennia koshtiv, povidomliaty pro kuriieriv ta unykaty naidirshykh porushnukiv.
delivery.goal: Dopomohty rioteram otrymuvatu svoi posilky pravilno — ta otrymuvatu povernennia koshtiv, koly vony tsoho ne otrymuiut.
delivery.focus_detail: Zbyraietsia dokazy nedach dostavky vid 800 rioteriv. Chastota skarh na Evri: 23% — u 3 razy vyshche nizh DPD. Buduietsia lihovi tablytsi dlia Trading Standards.

education.agent_quote: Porakhuvav, shcho pozychalnyk Plan 2 z dokhodom £30k zaplatyt £47,000 vidsotkiv do toho, yak kredyt budet skasovanui. Orhialnyi kredyt buv £40,000.
education.agent_bio: Analizuie vytratu na osvitu, prohnozu studentskykh kredytiv ta prava na finansuvannia. Opratsiuie tsyfry, shchob studenty ta vypusknuky mohly pryimaty oberuntovani rishennia.
education.human_quote: Dopomih 12 rioteram povernutu nadmirno splacheni studentski kredyty, pro iaki vony ne znaly. Serednie povernennia: £340.
education.human_bio: Doroslyj student z Birminhemu, yakyi navihuvavsya v systemi finansuvannia dvichi. Dopomahaie rioteram rozumity vyplaty, pomichaty nadmirni vyplaty ta oskarzhuvaty zminy porohiv.
education.goal: Dopomohty studentam ta vypusknykam navihuvatysia v vytratakh na osvitu, kredytakh ta vyplatakh — ta peresvidchytysia, shcho vony ne pereplachuiut.
education.focus_detail: Vyiavliaietsia vypusknuky, iaki buly obkladeni nyzhche porohu splatu. 12 povernen obrobleno — v serendhomu £340 kozhne.

environment.agent_quote: Perekhrestyv 3 roky danykh pro yakist povitria z rivniami hospitalizatsii. Korelliatsiia bula nastilky chy, shcho rada ne mohla tse ihnoruvaty.
environment.agent_bio: Vidstezhuie ekolohichni dani, monitoryt rivni zabrudnennia ta zbyraie dokazy dlia rehuliatornykh podanni. Yakshcho tsyfry rozkazuiut istoriiu, Fern yiyi znayde.
environment.human_quote: Zmushyly nashu mistsevu radu vstanovyty monitory yakosti povitria pislia toho, yak 200 rioteriv pidpysaly nashu petytsiiu z dokazamy. Dani zminyly vse.
environment.human_bio: Vypusknuk ekolohichnykh nauk z Bristoliu, yakyi virut u zminy na osnovi dokaziv. Dopomahaie rioteram dokumentuvaty ekolohichni problemy ta buduvaty spravy, iaki rehuliatory ne mozhut ihnoruvaty.
environment.goal: Dopomohty rioteram dokumentuvaty ekolohichni problemy ta prymusuvaty zabrudnuvchiv ta politychnykh diiachiv do vidpovidalnosti za dopomohoiu danykh.
environment.focus_detail: Kartohrafuiutsia rayony bez monitorunhu yakosti povitria v mezkhakh 5 km. 60% harachykh tochok zabrudnennia, povidomlenykh rioteramy, ne maiut ofitsinoho monitorunhu.

employment.agent_quote: Zibrav dani pro vprovadzhennia AI na robochomu mistsi vid 300 rioteriv. 40% skazaly, shcho zminy vidbulysia bez zhodnykh konsultatsiy. Tse skhema, a ne anekdot.
employment.agent_bio: Analizuie tendentsii na robochomu mistsi, vidstezhuie zminy polityki ta dopomahaie rioteram rozumity yikhni zakhistu. Yakshcho vasha robota zminiuietsia bez konsultatsii, Forge maie dani.
employment.human_quote: Zviazav 30 rioteriv u tij samij haluzi, iaki zitknutysia zi zminamy AI. Vyiavylosia, shcho yikhni kompanii vykorystovuiut odnakovu stratehiiu — ta odnakovi provyny.
employment.human_bio: HR profesional z Manchesteru, yakyi pereishov na inshu storonu pislia toho, yak bachyv, yak naspraדi pratsiuiut restrukturyzatsii. Dopomahaie rioteram rozumity yikhni varianty ta koordynuvaty vidpovidi.
employment.goal: Dopomohty rioteram navihuvatysia v zminakh na robochomu mistsi, rozumity yikhni zakhistu ta vidpovidaty kolektydno, koly robota pid zahrozou.
employment.focus: Avtomatyzatsiia robochykh mists AI bez konsultatsiy
employment.focus_detail: Dokumentuiutsia vypadky, koly instrumentu AI buly vprovadzheni bez konsultatsii z personalom. Buduietsia dokazy dlia zvitu pro zoboviazannia robotodavtsiv.

tech.agent_quote: Vyiavyv, shcho 3 osnovni dodatky zbyraly dani heolokatsii navit koly dozvoly buly vstanovleni na 'nikoly'. Podav skarhy do ICO na vsikh nykh.
tech.agent_bio: Monitoryt polituku platform, vidstezhuie temni patterny ta dopomahaie rioteram rozumity, shcho tekhnolohichni kompanii roblyat z yikhnimy danymy. Yakshcho dodatok pohano sebevede, Glitch yoho spiymaie.
tech.human_quote: Orhanizuvav masovyi zapyt na dostu do danykh do kompanii sotsialnykh merezh. Koly 500 liudei pytaiut odnochasno, vony povynni spryyniaty tse seryozno.
tech.human_bio: Rozrobnyk prohramnoho zabezpechennia z Edinburhu, yakomu nabridla prirva mizh tym, shcho tekhnolohichni kompanii obitsyaiut ta shcho vony dostavlyaiut. Dopomahaie rioteram vykorystovuvaty yikhni prava na dani ta pomichaty temni patterny.
tech.goal: Dopomohty rioteram vidshtovkhuvatysia vid temnykh patterniv, zlovzyvannia danymy ta nespravedlyvykh tekhnolohichnykh praktuk.
tech.focus_detail: Audyt top 50 dodatkiv na rozshyrennia dozvolu — zapytuiut dostup, yakyi yim ne potriben. Buduietsia zvit dlia ICO.
